subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one of Abdu'l-Baha! Nasuhi Bey, the new Ambassador of the Sublime Ottoman State, is a person of consummate excellence and unshakeable loyalty to his government [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نصوحی بیک سفیر جدید دولت علیه عثمانیه شخص کامل و صادق دولت
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @non-participation in politics
